videos.headline: Crystal Palace cruise past 10-man Millwall and into FA Cup quarterfinals
videos.title: Crystal Palace cruise past 10-man Millwall and into FA Cup quarterfinals
videos.caption: Premier League Crystal Palace made light work of Championship side Millwall, who saw goalkeeper Liam Roberts sent off for a horror tackle on Jean-Philippe Mateta.
videos.description: Premier League Crystal Palace made light work of Championship side Millwall, who saw goalkeeper Liam Roberts sent off for a horror tackle on Jean-Philippe Mateta.

videos.headline: Millwall's Tanganga nods into his own net to put Palace ahead
videos.title: Millwall's Tanganga nods into his own net to put Palace ahead
videos.caption: Japhet Tanganga scores an OG to give Premier League Crystal Palace the lead over 10-man Millwall.
videos.description: Japhet Tanganga scores an OG to give Premier League Crystal Palace the lead over 10-man Millwall.
